meaning: n.额外费用,奖金,奖赏,保险费,(货币兑现的)贴水
examples: Shares are selling at a premium.
Space is at a premium in a one-bedroomed apartment.
You have to pay a high premium for express delivery.
High-tech and futuristic smart cars can bring high demand, premium prices and high margins.
Reynolds started raising the price of premium brands to offset payments to the settlement.
